# HPD.ML.Core.FilteredDataHandle

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

Lazy row filtering. Does not touch data until cursored.
